metadata.description: A curated catalog of Claude Code plugins from SuperScript. All plugins are external — no plugin code lives in this repository.

plugins.name: cli-skill
plugins.description: Guide creation of Claude Code skills that wrap CLI tools

plugins.name: kak-script
plugins.description: Write kakoune script files adhering to SuperScript standards

plugins.name: llm-isms
plugins.description: Find and fix LLM-isms in documents

plugins.name: makefile-writing
plugins.description: Write Makefiles adhering to SuperScript standards

plugins.name: ports-dev
plugins.description: Skills for creating and maintaining FreeBSD ports

plugins.name: project-setup
plugins.description: Create new project repositories of various types

plugins.name: scrip-programming
plugins.description: Programming conventions for use of the scrip project

plugins.name: shell-programming
plugins.description: POSIX shell programming conventions for sh scripts

plugins.name: skill-config
plugins.description: Ensure skill configuration meets SuperScript standards

plugins.name: webrows
plugins.description: Browser automation via the webrows Selenium WebDriver CLI
